title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that jointly understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on tasks including drug toxicity prediction, cell labeling, cancer drug discovery, drug repurposing, antibody design, and de novo drug generation.
